message:
Gemini: inject web search tool in Stream() per spec 7.x

Fixes D-02: Stream() now adds google_search tool when req.WebSearch is true,
matching the existing Complete() behavior. Respects the Gemini limitation that
google_search cannot be combined with functionDeclarations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
